overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest trail at night during light rain, carrying a lit torch to illuminate the winding dirt path ahead. The camera smoothly follows from behind as the character navigates through dense vegetation with a cloudy night sky overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail at night with torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch to light the way through the dark forest

entered.detail: winding dirt trail illuminated by torchlight
bright flame held by the character casting dynamic shadows
dense shrubs and tall grass lining the left side of the trail
thick vegetation and small trees on the right side of the path
dense dark forest forming the backdrop against the night sky
dark stormy clouds with faint ambient light breaking through

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a character walking along a dirt forest trail at night. The torch illuminates the immediate path ahead while rain falls gently. Dense vegetation lines both sides of the trail and a dark forest looms in the background under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail approaching denser woodland

events.description: character briefly slows walking pace and adjusts direction to follow the curving trail

agents.ego_description: slows momentarily to navigate a slight curve in the path then resumes steady walking

entered.detail: faint silhouette of mountains visible on the horizon through the trees
fresh vegetation coming into view as the character progresses along the trail

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest trail, the character briefly slows to navigate a curve before proceeding. The initial bushes pass out of view behind the camera while new vegetation and distant mountains come into view on the left. The torch continues to cast flickering light on the dirt path as the forest canopy draws closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked forest trail at night, transitioning from a dense thicket toward a vista of distant mountains. It begins with a third-person view of a character walking forward, their lit torch casting a flickering glow on the dirt path amidst falling rain and heavy vegetation. As the character navigates a curve in the trail, the initial bushes recede behind the camera, allowing the scene to open up on the left. The perspective then shifts to reveal looming mountains in the distance while the forest canopy draws closer overhead. Finally, the camera continues its steady pursuit, maintaining the torch's warm illumination against the dark, cloudy night sky.
